phases: Phase 1: find_grandfathered_entries + verify flag + CLI wiring + tests

limitations: V1 ships only Option D (verify-ledger --tolerate-known-grandfathered flag); flag is OFF by default; tolerated entries must be in duplicate-previous_hash set AND below cutoff (default 207); read-only verifier semantics; ledger content unchanged
non_goals: Options A (RECONCILIATION entry append), B (post-anchor pinning at reconciliation entry), C (per-session sub-ledger merge tool) from GH #85 deferred to future phase; no operator-authorization protocol needed in V1 because operation is read-only
exclusions: no changes to verify_post_anchor (Phase 66 already handles pre-anchor case); no changes to check_previous_hash_uniqueness (still enforces uniqueness on new entries); no new doctrine file (extends SG-ConcurrentLedgerRace-A per GH #92 progressive-disclosure)
